source: Vibriance Retinol Serum OTO2 upsell page — simplified layout for cross-sell offers
description: Cross-sell upsell page with stat banner, warning hook, product claims, benefit list, usage instructions, pricing, and CTA. Used for OTO2-5 (cross-sell, protection). Simpler than OTO1 template.

page_title.description: SEO page title (product name or offer name)

logo_url.description: Brand logo image URL. Displayed at top of page.

banner_stat.description: Big stat/social proof at top of page. Must grab attention with a specific percentage or number.
banner_stat.example: 80% Of Repeat Customers Add THIS To Their Order...

progress_text.description: Text inside progress bar. Shows order completion status.

warning_headline.description: Warning/attention headline. Creates curiosity and urgency. Two lines: warning label + benefit promise.
warning_headline.example: WARNING: Only for those ready to uncover dramatically younger-looking skin.

product_image_url.description: Product image URL. Shows the cross-sell product alongside the main product.

product_intro.description: Product introduction line. Frames the cross-sell as an upgrade/addition to what they just bought.
product_intro.example: Upgrade your order now with Vibriance Retinol Serum:

product_claim.description: Main product claim. The bold differentiator that makes this product unique. Can include multiple formatting breaks.
product_claim.example: It's the FIRST & ONLY retinol serum made exclusively for the delicate MATURE skin of women over 50...
product_claim.format: plain text, bold claims with specific qualifiers

product_science.description: Science/technology explanation. How the product works, mechanism of action. Builds credibility.
product_science.example: It stimulates natural skin collagen while reducing DEEP WRINKLES using Poly-Pore Technology, our SLOW-RELEASE retinol that minimizes skin irritation!

results_intro.description: Transition text before benefit list. Frames what results to expect.

benefit_1.description: Benefit bullet 1. Starts with emoji heart. Specific outcome.

usage_instructions.description: How to use the product together with what they already bought. AM/PM routine or complementary usage. Must explain WHY both products work better together.
usage_instructions.example: Use Super C Serum in the morning to hydrate and protect. And use Vibriance Retinol in the evening to multiply the rejuvenating effects! Using both together ensures 24-hour care for mature skin.
usage_instructions.format: plain text, usage instructions + synergy explanation

pricing_headline.description: Pricing section headline. Frames the offer as a treatment/supply/plan.
pricing_headline.example: Upgrade Your Order Now With A One-Month Treatment:

price_display.description: Main price display. The offer price with context.

discount_display.description: Discount badge text. Shows savings percentage and exclusivity.

countdown_label.description: Text before the countdown timer. Creates urgency.

countdown_minutes.description: Countdown timer duration in minutes. Usually 10 minutes.

guarantee_text.description: Guarantee/risk-free text. Must include guarantee duration and terms.
guarantee_text.example: Try It RISK FREE for one full year! Use it all and love it, or your money back!

cta_text.description: Call-to-action button text. Must be enthusiastic and action-oriented.

rejection_text.description: Rejection link anchor text. The 'no thanks' option.
rejection_text.example: No thanks, I'll pass on this offer

rejection_reason.description: Rejection consequence. Explains what they lose by saying no.
rejection_reason.example: on the lowest price we've ever offered. (Please note, this one-time discount isn't available anywhere else.)
